name: Google Cloud Healthcare API
description: A fully managed, HIPAA-eligible service for ingesting, storing, analyzing, and integrating healthcare data in Google Cloud.

hasAPI.name: Cloud Healthcare FHIR API
hasAPI.description: Managed FHIR R4/STU3/DSTU2 data repository for storing and querying clinical resources.

hasAPI.name: Cloud Healthcare HL7v2 API
hasAPI.description: Managed ingestion and storage of HL7 version 2.x clinical messages.

hasAPI.name: Cloud Healthcare DICOM API
hasAPI.description: DICOMweb-compliant storage and retrieval of medical imaging studies.

hasAPI.name: Cloud Healthcare Consent Management API
hasAPI.description: Patient-centric consent policy management and enforcement for healthcare data access.

hasAPI.name: Cloud Healthcare De-identification API
hasAPI.description: Automated PHI/PII redaction and transformation aligned with HIPAA Safe Harbor and Expert Determination methods.

compliance.name: HIPAA Eligibility
compliance.description: Google Cloud Healthcare API is a HIPAA-eligible service covered under Google Cloud's BAA.
